_schema.description: BJH stroke patient clinical labels (4 tasks). Keys are subject_id (numeric string).

fields.FMA_UE: FMA hand score (Fugl-Meyer hand sub-score in this project), integer 0-20

deprecated_fields.wrist_tone: 腕肌张力 — retired; values retained for archival only and NOT consumed by training/inference.

notes: FMA_UE field name kept for backwards compat but actually stores the FMA hand sub-score (0-20).
The 1+ class for tone is a distinct categorical label and MUST be kept as a string.
wrist_tone was retired in schema v3; the field may still exist on legacy subjects but the training pipeline ignores it.
